title: The Busy Airport
content: Lily arrived at one of the busiest airports she had ever seen. Thousands of travelers moved through the terminals carrying luggage and searching for gates. Large departure boards displayed flights from around the world. Despite the crowds, the airport was well organized and easy to navigate. Lily checked her gate number several times and followed the signs carefully. Before boarding, she bought a bottle of water and watched airplanes take off through a large window. The busy atmosphere reminded her how many people travel every day.
